taglineLines: with machine learning at the core.
hero.bio: I build data-driven digital products by combining machine learning, analytics, and full-stack software development to turn data into solutions that create real impact. My work spans the entire development process — from data exploration and feature engineering to model training, evaluation, and deploying web applications that users can rely on. With BNSP Associate Data Scientist certification, hands-on machine learning research, and experience building diverse applications, I bridge Data Science and Software Development. I develop data pipelines, predictive models, analytics dashboards, and modern web applications using Python, TensorFlow, Next.js, React, and Laravel — so the models I build are not only accurate, but also usable in production-ready products. I believe a model's value does not stop at evaluation metrics, but when it is implemented as a stable, scalable digital solution that helps organizations make faster, sharper, data-driven decisions.

timeline.title: Experience
timeline.subtitle: A visual map of my academic, professional, and research milestones.

ml-research.description: Conducting undergraduate research focused on PM2.5 air quality prediction using a hybrid Sine Cosine Algorithm (SCA) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) model. Responsible for collecting and preprocessing datasets, performing feature engineering, optimizing deep learning models, and evaluating prediction performance using RMSE, MAPE, and R². The research demonstrates the practical application of machine learning techniques to address real-world environmental challenges and serves as the foundation for scientific publication.

bbkb-intern.project: Ministry of Industry of the Republic of Indonesia
bbkb-intern.description: Contributed to the development of SIMAGANG, a web-based internship registration and management system designed to digitize internship administration within BBSPJIKB Yogyakarta. Collaborated with the development team to build frontend and backend features, integrate database functionality, implement authentication, and optimize application workflows. This experience strengthened my practical skills in full-stack software development, teamwork, and delivering secure, scalable, and user-centered digital solutions.

istana-sayur.description: Led the end-to-end development of a production e-commerce website for Istana Sayur Buah, coordinating a multidisciplinary team from planning through deployment. Gathered business requirements with stakeholders, scoped the product, and delivered a responsive full-stack storefront with category-led catalog, trust pages, and a complete shopping flow. This project strengthened my leadership, communication, project management, and full-stack delivery skills in a real client engagement.

python.description: Primary language for data analysis, machine learning, and backend scripting — versatile, readable, and widely used across the data science and ML workflow.

pandas.description: Data manipulation library for cleaning, transforming, and analyzing structured datasets with DataFrames — essential for preprocessing before modeling.

numpy.description: Foundation library for numerical computing — provides fast array operations, linear algebra, and mathematical functions that power ML workflows.

tensorflow.description: Open-source deep learning framework for building and training neural networks — used for predictive modeling and AI-driven applications.

keras.description: High-level neural network API that simplifies model building on top of TensorFlow — ideal for rapid prototyping of deep learning solutions.

sklearn.description: Scikit-learn provides classic machine learning algorithms, preprocessing tools, and model evaluation utilities for structured data problems.

powerbi.description: Microsoft business intelligence platform for building interactive dashboards, KPI reports, and data storytelling — turning model outputs and datasets into decision-ready visuals.

tableau.description: Leading data visualization tool for exploring, analyzing, and presenting insights through interactive charts and dashboards — ideal for communicating ML and analytics results to stakeholders.

laravel.description: PHP framework for building robust web applications with elegant syntax, MVC architecture, authentication, and REST API support.

react.description: JavaScript library for building interactive user interfaces with component-based architecture, efficient rendering, and a rich ecosystem.

nextjs.description: React framework for production-grade web apps with server-side rendering, routing, and optimized performance out of the box.

vercel.description: Cloud platform for deploying and hosting modern web applications — seamless integration with Next.js and fast global delivery.

nodejs.description: JavaScript runtime for server-side development — enables building scalable APIs, real-time apps, and full-stack JavaScript solutions.

codeigniter.description: Lightweight PHP framework for rapid web development with a simple MVC pattern — used for building structured backend applications.

mysql.description: Relational database management system for storing, querying, and managing structured application data with SQL.

xampp.description: Local development stack bundling Apache, MySQL, and PHP — used for building and testing web applications on a local machine.

supabase.description: Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL, authentication, storage, and real-time APIs for modern app backends.

git.description: Version control system for tracking code changes, collaborating with teams, and managing project history across branches.

github.description: Platform for hosting Git repositories, code collaboration, pull requests, and open-source project management.

cursor.description: AI-powered code editor that accelerates development with intelligent autocomplete, refactoring, and pair-programming assistance.

colab.description: Cloud-based Jupyter notebook environment by Google — ideal for running Python, training ML models, and sharing data science work.

html.description: Standard markup language for structuring web content — the semantic foundation of every web page and application interface.

css.description: Stylesheet language for designing layout, typography, colors, and responsive visual presentation across web interfaces.

javascript.description: Core programming language of the web — powers interactivity, dynamic content, and full-stack development with modern frameworks.

tailwind.description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom, responsive, and consistent user interfaces without leaving your HTML.

bootstrap.description: Popular CSS framework with pre-built components and a responsive grid system for fast, mobile-friendly web UI development.

figma.description: Collaborative design tool for wireframing, prototyping, and crafting user-centered interface systems before development.

istana-sayur-buah.overview: Istana Sayur Buah (Freshly) is a production e-commerce website built for a fresh produce retailer in Manokwari, Papua. The platform digitizes a local vegetable and fruit business into a trustworthy online storefront — from homepage messaging and category discovery to product listings, store story, and customer-facing service information. The site was successfully deployed at istanasayurbuah.com; the domain later expired because the client chose not to continue hosting and maintenance.
istana-sayur-buah.problem: The store relied on offline ordering and informal communication, making product discovery, pricing visibility, and customer reach limited beyond walk-in and local word-of-mouth channels.
istana-sayur-buah.solution: Delivered a responsive e-commerce website with structured navigation, category-based shopping, product cards with pricing, and brand pages that communicate quality, freshness, and store credibility.
features: Homepage with fresh-produce hero and category entry points
Shop catalog with vegetable, fruit, juice, and peanuts filters
Product cards with pricing and add-to-cart flow
About Us page with store story, metrics, and team profiles
Contact and service-trust sections (free shipping, quality, support)
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
Freshly brand system — green palette, produce logo, clean hierarchy
istana-sayur-buah.challenges: Aligning multidisciplinary team output with client expectations while translating a local retail business into a clear, conversion-friendly digital experience.
istana-sayur-buah.result: Successfully delivered and deployed a production e-commerce website for Istana Sayur Buah. The project demonstrates end-to-end client delivery — from design and development to launch — even though the live domain is no longer active after the client discontinued maintenance.

exporetrade.overview: Exporetrade is a full-stack marketplace platform that connects buyers and suppliers in one integrated ecosystem. The platform enables buyers to submit sourcing requests, receive supplier offers, manage negotiations, and monitor order fulfillment through a modern web application.
exporetrade.problem: Many sourcing processes are still handled manually through email or messaging applications, making supplier management, quotation tracking, and communication inefficient.
exporetrade.solution: Developed a centralized marketplace platform where buyers and suppliers can interact through a structured workflow, from request submission to order completion.
exporetrade.challenges: Designing a scalable marketplace workflow that supports multiple user roles while maintaining a simple user experience.
exporetrade.result: Successfully developed a production-ready marketplace platform with responsive UI and scalable architecture.

simagang-bbkb.overview: SIMAGANG is a web-based internship registration and management system for the Center for Crafts & Batik (BBKB) Yogyakarta under the Ministry of Industry. The platform digitizes internship administration — from public discovery and application submission to structured onboarding for craft and batik internship programs.
simagang-bbkb.problem: Internship administration at BBKB was largely manual, making registration, document handling, applicant tracking, and communication inefficient for both participants and administrators.
simagang-bbkb.solution: Built a modern web portal with a clear registration flow, internship listings, program information, gallery showcase, and demo system access — helping applicants and admins move through a structured digital workflow.
features: Public landing with BBKB branding and program overview
3-step registration flow: Create Account, Apply, Selection & Onboarding
Demo portfolio and admin demo access
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
simagang-bbkb.challenges: Designing a secure, scalable internship workflow that serves both public applicants and internal administrators while keeping the experience simple and trustworthy.
simagang-bbkb.result: Delivered a production-deployed internship portal that centralizes BBKB Yogyakarta's internship registration and management experience.

udaracast.overview: UdaraCast is an intelligent air quality forecasting platform that predicts PM2.5 concentration using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) enhanced with Sine-Cosine feature transformation.
udaracast.problem: Air quality information is generally limited to historical monitoring and lacks predictive insights that help users anticipate pollution levels.
udaracast.solution: Developed a forecasting platform capable of predicting PM2.5 levels while presenting visualization dashboards and health category recommendations.
udaracast.metricsSummary: The SCA-LSTM model achieved RMSE of 0.1042, MAPE of 0.8847, and a coefficient of determination (R²) of 0.9787.
udaracast.challenges: Building an accurate forecasting model while integrating AI inference into a modern web application.
udaracast.research: Based on undergraduate research focused on hybrid Sine-Cosine Algorithm (SCA) and LSTM for PM2.5 air quality prediction.

kedokploso.overview: Official village information system designed to provide digital public services, tourism information, and local community activities.
kedokploso.problem: Village information was previously scattered across social media and offline announcements, making public access difficult.
kedokploso.solution: Developed a modern village website that centralizes public information, tourism content, maps, announcements, and village profiles.
kedokploso.challenges: Creating an accessible information platform for both local residents and visitors.
kedokploso.result: Successfully digitized village information into a responsive and user-friendly platform.

Tri-fold layout: branding, about us, services & contact

freshly.overview: Freshly is a client-facing e-commerce experience for Istana Sayur Buah — a fresh vegetable and fruit retailer in Manokwari, Papua. The design translates a local produce business into a trustworthy digital storefront with clear navigation, category-led shopping, and brand storytelling that emphasizes organic quality and community trust.
highlights: Hero homepage with bold fresh-produce messaging and category entry points
Shop catalog with vegetable, fruit, juice, and peanuts filters plus priced product cards
About Us page with store story, customer metrics, service promises, and team profiles
Consistent FRESHLY identity — produce logo mark, leaf-green palette, and clean sans-serif hierarchy
Testimonials and value pillars (free shipping, always fresh, quality, 24/7 support) for conversion trust

sehatin.overview: Sehatin is a mobile wellness app designed for a campus UI/UX competency project — representing the university with a complete health companion experience. The flow covers first launch, guided onboarding across physical and mental health themes, system notification permission, and a feature-rich home dashboard for daily calorie and activity tracking.
highlights: Splash screen with runner icon and soft purple Sehatin identity
Four-step onboarding: health program, mental wellness, rich features, and user benefits
Native iOS notification permission dialog with clear copy
Home dashboard with Physical Fitness, Nutritious Food, and Mental Health cards
Calorie ring tracker with target, consumed, and burned metrics plus daily activity goals
Bottom navigation — Home, AI, Consultation, and Profile

miso.overview: MISO is a mobile food ordering experience designed for a noodle and meatball restaurant client in Sumpiuh. The app turns a local favorite into a friendly digital ordering flow — from bold orange branding and menu browsing to product storytelling, quantity control, and a warm success screen that closes the purchase loop.
highlights: Intro splash with expressive MISO wordmark and orange brand personality
Menu home with search, category chips (All, Meatball, Noodle, Toppings), and product cards
Chili Oil Chicken Noodle detail with description, quantity stepper, and sticky order button
Order success screen with celebratory copy and return action
Rounded card UI, circular food photography, and consistent orange accent system

food-onboarding.overview: Trust-building onboarding for a food marketplace — communicating safety guarantees before users set their location, with friendly illustration and step-by-step flow.
highlights: Illustrated food icons with playful dotted paths
Safety checklist with checkmark trust indicators
Onboarding copy focused on consumption confidence

burhans-cell.overview: Electronics retail mobile app for Om Burhans Cell — shop homepage with brand discovery, product recommendations, and a detailed iPhone product page with storage/color variants.
highlights: Category pills and horizontal product recommendations
Brand logo row for quick filtering
Product detail with variant chips and review stats
Sticky price bar with add-to-cart action

sehatku.overview: Health companion app Sehatku — balancing daily wellness tracking with doctor discovery, using a soft purple palette and card-based layout for approachable health UX.
highlights: Circular calorie tracker with progress gauge
Category tiles for fitness, nutrition, and mental health
Consultation banner and doctor listing cards

pm25-sca-lstm.overview: Research notebook for global PM2.5 air quality forecasting using SCA-LSTM — combining sine-cosine temporal encoding with LSTM networks to capture seasonal patterns in pollution data.
highlights: Sine-cosine feature transformation for cyclical patterns
LSTM sequence modeling for multi-step forecasting
Deployed as UdaraCast public forecasting platform
pm25-sca-lstm.metricsSummary: SCA-LSTM achieved RMSE 0.1042, MAPE 0.8847, and R² 0.9787 on PM2.5 forecasting.

imdb-sentiment-lstm.overview: IMDB movie review sentiment classification using LSTM — text tokenization, sequence padding, embedding layer, and binary sentiment prediction with training history visualization.
highlights: IMDB dataset preprocessing and vocabulary building
LSTM recurrent network for sequence classification

pattern-knn.overview: Pattern recognition fundamentals with k-Nearest Neighbors — exploring labeled datasets, choosing k, and evaluating classifier performance on test data.

pattern-svm.overview: Pattern recognition with Support Vector Machines — kernel selection, margin optimization, and visualizing decision boundaries for multi-class classification.
highlights: SVM classifier with linear and RBF kernels

ecg-rf-coronary.overview: ECG heartbeat classification for coronary heart disease detection using Random Forest — signal preprocessing, feature extraction, and medical diagnostic evaluation.
highlights: ECG signal preprocessing and heartbeat segmentation

voice-emotion-mfcc.overview: Voice emotion recognition from audio using MFCC features — comparing SVC and Random Forest classifiers on emotional speech datasets.
highlights: MFCC feature extraction from audio signals
SVC and Random Forest model comparison

diabetic-retinopathy-cnn.overview: Diabetic retinopathy detection using PyTorch CNN — training convolutional networks on retinal fundus images with augmentation and medical imaging evaluation.
highlights: PyTorch CNN architecture for image classification

heartbeat-cnn-wavelet.overview: Heartbeat classification with wavelet-transform feature extraction and CNN — combining time-frequency analysis with deep learning for ECG signal classification.
highlights: Wavelet transform for ECG feature extraction
CNN architecture for heartbeat pattern recognition

responsi-pattern.overview: Applied pattern recognition project with hands-on classification — dataset exploration, model training, and performance evaluation.

praktikum8-pattern.overview: Advanced pattern recognition methods with visualization and multi-model comparison exercises.

praktikum5-pattern.overview: Foundational classification workflow including dataset splitting, training, and evaluation metrics.

praktikum1-pattern.overview: Core pattern recognition concepts — Euclidean distance, descriptive statistics, and hands-on analytical cases.
highlights: Mean, variance, and basic statistical measures
NumPy array operations on sample data

praktikum2-pattern.overview: Data preparation pipeline — loading CSV datasets, merging sources, and preprocessing before modeling.
highlights: Google Colab and Drive dataset integration

praktikum3-pattern.overview: Feature extraction from the IRIS dataset — first-order statistical features, distribution shape analysis, and visualization.
highlights: First-order feature extraction per numeric column
Kurtosis and skewness analysis with SciPy

praktikum4-pattern.overview: Decision Tree classification on the Wisconsin Breast Cancer dataset — cleaning, splitting, training, and confusion matrix evaluation.

praktikum6-pattern.overview: K-Means and Agglomerative Clustering on student performance data from UCI — normalization, clustering, and group interpretation.

praktikum7-pattern.overview: MNIST digit classifier — custom histogram feature extraction from 28×28 images and KNN-based classification.
highlights: MNIST CSV loading and image visualization

praktikum10-pattern.overview: Bioinformatics pattern recognition — parsing FASTA genome sequences, extracting k-mer frequency features, and classifying promoter regions.
highlights: NCBI FASTA download and Biopython parsing

dl7-lstm-forecast.overview: LSTM time-series forecasting project — data loading, sequence preparation, training, and prediction visualization.

dl8-gru-sentiment.overview: Sentiment analysis on Twitter data using GRU networks to classify tweets as positive, negative, or neutral from the GOP Debate dataset.

dl9-text-vectorization.overview: Foundational text mining with Scikit-learn CountVectorizer — converting raw sentences to document-term matrices for machine learning.

dl9-nmt-attention.overview: Seq2Seq neural machine translation with attention — encoder-decoder architecture and bilingual translation evaluation.

dl10-transformer-nmt.overview: Transformer-based neural machine translation from Portuguese to English using multi-head attention, positional encoding, and TensorFlow.

dl11-gan.overview: GAN training on MNIST digits with separate discriminator and generator networks for synthetic image generation.

responsi-neural-style-transfer.overview: Neural Style Transfer — combining content and style images using deep CNN feature representations and iterative optimization in TensorFlow.
highlights: Style loss and content loss optimization

dl4-cnn.overview: Convolutional Neural Network with TensorFlow Keras for CIFAR-10 image classification — preprocessing, architecture design, training, and accuracy evaluation.

dl5-transfer-learning.overview: Transfer learning with pre-trained VGG16 and ResNet50 on a custom image dataset — feature extraction, fine-tuning, and classification evaluation.
highlights: Pre-trained VGG16 and ResNet50 from ImageNet
Fine-tuning top layers for new classes
Transfer learning vs training from scratch comparison

dl6-fastrcnn.overview: Object detection with Fast R-CNN via TensorFlow Hub — detecting and localizing objects in images with bounding boxes and confidence scores.
highlights: TensorFlow Hub object detection model loading

airline-lstm.overview: Time-series forecasting of airline passenger surges using LSTM — analyzing historical passenger volume patterns, training recurrent networks, and evaluating forecast accuracy on seasonal travel demand.
highlights: LSTM sequence model for surge prediction

mnist-knn.overview: End-to-end MNIST digit classification workflow — extracting histogram features from 28×28 grayscale images and training a k-Nearest Neighbors classifier with strong per-class precision and recall.
highlights: Histogram-based feature extraction from pixel data
Sample digit visualization and label distribution
Test prediction visualization on unseen digits

breast-cancer-dt.overview: Medical classification benchmark comparing four algorithms on breast cancer detection data — evaluating accuracy, confusion matrix, and F1-score across Logistic Regression, KNN, SVM, and Random Forest.
highlights: Multi-model comparison with accuracy bar charts
Confusion matrix heatmap for best performer
Feature scaling and train-test split pipeline

sms-spam.overview: SMS spam detection using text classification methods — preprocessing raw messages, extracting text features, and training classifiers to distinguish spam from legitimate SMS.
highlights: End-to-end notebook from data load to results

ecg-analysis.overview: ECG biomedical signal analysis covering both time and frequency domains — loading patient signal CSV data, plotting waveforms, and applying FFT to identify frequency components and noise patterns.

feature-extraction-viz.overview: Data visualization and characterization using first-order feature extraction — statistical regression with Statsmodels, stacked bar charts, and overlaid histogram distributions across multiple cases.
highlights: OLS regression with Statsmodels correlation analysis
Stacked bar chart for multi-category comparison

student-pca.overview: Academic student data exploration — preprocessing survey records, applying PCA for 2D dimensionality reduction, and visualizing subject scores and categorical distributions for major recommendation insights.
highlights: Missing value handling and column cleaning
PCA scatter plot (PC1 vs PC2) for cluster patterns
Bar charts for student space and graduation timeline categories

iris-knn.overview: Multivariate exploration of the Iris dataset on Kaggle — advanced visualizations including parallel coordinates, Andrews curves, and pair plots, followed by KNN classification across three species.
highlights: Parallel coordinates and Andrews curves for class separation
Seaborn pair plot with species color coding
Box plots comparing sepal and petal measurements
3D PCA scatter plot for dimensionality reduction

motorcycle-ml.overview: End-to-end analysis of a dummy used-motorcycle sales dataset — from business questions and data wrangling through EDA bar charts to clustering and classification experiments.
highlights: Business question definition and data gathering
Missing value and duplicate assessment pipeline

cifar10-cnn.overview: Deep learning image classification on CIFAR-10 — building a Convolutional Neural Network with data augmentation and dropout to classify 10 object categories from 32×32 color images.
highlights: CNN architecture with convolution and pooling layers
Training loss/accuracy curves and class evaluation

nmt-attention.overview: Attention-based Neural Machine Translation for Spanish–English — seq2seq encoder-decoder model where attention mechanism aligns source and target tokens for improved translation quality.

transformer-nmt.overview: Transformer-based language translation model — implementing self-attention and multi-head attention layers with positional encoding for parallel sequence processing without recurrence.
highlights: Multi-head attention for diverse representation learning
Positional encoding for sequence order information

ecg-analysis-alt.overview: Extended ECG biomedical signal notebook — additional waveform plots, FFT spectrum exploration, and multi-subject signal comparison from an alternate Colab export.
highlights: FFT frequency spectrum and noise inspection

sms-spam-alt.overview: Alternate SMS spam classification notebook — text preprocessing, feature vectorization, and binary classifier evaluation on labeled message datasets.
highlights: Feature extraction for short SMS text

pm25-sca-lstm-alt.overview: Extended PM2.5 forecasting notebook using SCA-LSTM — alternate Colab run with sine-cosine encoding, LSTM training, and RMSE/MAPE/R² evaluation.

feature-extraction-viz-alt.overview: Alternate feature extraction and visualization notebook — Statsmodels regression, stacked bar charts, and distribution overlays for multi-case data characterization.

pertamina-lstm-pipes.overview: A portfolio case study built on a public Kaggle oil & gas pipeline dataset. This interactive dashboard packages a full LSTM predictive maintenance workflow — connecting data understanding, encoded feature relationships, and rigorous model evaluation in one Plotly view.
highlights: LSTM reached R² 0.9795 — clearly outperforming Linear Regression at R² 0.8703
Actual vs predicted points hug the identity line across the full 0–10 mm loss range
Residuals center near zero with a healthy bell-shaped distribution
Condition_Critical correlates strongly with thickness loss (r = 0.86) in the encoded feature space
chartInsights: Five-panel evaluation board: target distribution, correlation matrix, prediction accuracy, residual distribution, and homoscedasticity check — the full story from EDA to deployment readiness.
pertamina-lstm-pipes.metricsSummary: The LSTM model delivers production-grade accuracy with R² 0.9795, MAE 0.3057, and MSE 0.1793 — strong evidence for predictive maintenance use cases.

pertamina-rf-pipes.overview: A portfolio case study on a public Kaggle pipeline dataset. This decision-oriented Random Forest dashboard layers exploratory histograms, correlation structure, condition-based degradation over time, comparative box plots, and feature importance.
highlights: Random Forest Regressor achieves R² 0.98 on thickness loss prediction
Condition_Normal is the strongest predictor in the feature importance panel
Material loss percentage and temperature also rank high in model drivers
Thickness loss stratifies cleanly into Normal, Moderate, and Critical bands over 25 years
chartInsights: Executive summary view: time-based condition scatter, material and grade comparisons, and Random Forest feature importance in one screen.
Eight-variable histogram grid reveals pipe size peaks, skewed material loss, and uniform corrosion impact across the fleet.
Correlation heatmap highlights the 0.91 link between pipe size and wall thickness — a key engineering relationship.
Interactive scatter of thickness loss vs operating years, color-coded by Normal, Moderate, and Critical condition tiers.
pertamina-rf-pipes.metricsSummary: Random Forest reaches R² 0.98, giving maintenance teams a reliable regression layer on top of rich interactive diagnostics.

pertamina-kmeans-refinery.overview: A portfolio case study using public Kaggle refinery operation data. This unsupervised analytics dashboard segments operating behavior with K-Means — interactive 3D, scatter, and radar views expose seven distinct operational profiles.
highlights: Seven clusters separated in 3D gravity–yield–pressure space
Radar chart compares average operational signatures per cluster
2D scatter reveals isolated high-yield outliers at extreme gravity values
Feature scaling applied after zero missing-value validation
chartInsights: Rotate and explore seven refinery clusters in 3D — gravity, percentage yield, and vapour pressure define each operational pocket.
Gravity vs percentage yield scatter colored by cluster ID — spot outliers and dense operational groups at a glance.
Radar profiles show which distillation and vapour-pressure traits differentiate each cluster’s average behavior.
